name: Karnataka State Financial Corporation (KSFC) Term Loan
retrieval_text: KSFC provides term loans from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 10 crore at interest rates of 9-12% per annum to micro, small and medium enterprises in manufacturing, services, and trade sectors across Karnataka's 29 branch offices. Women entrepreneurs receive a 1% interest rebate under a dedicated KSWDC-backed subvention scheme; SC/ST entrepreneurs receive an additional 1% rebate. Margin money requirement is 20% in backward districts and 22.5% elsewhere. Repayment period is up to 10 years including a moratorium of up to 2 years. Collateral is mandatory. Processing fee is 1% of the loan amount.
